questionHtml: Assuming that the populations of bacteria are under bottom-up control, identify the mesocosms in which the bacterial populations will be highest.
markschemeHtml:
soil and no fish «mesocosm» AND soil and fish «mesocosm» ✔

Both mesocosms required

Accept answers such as “the two with soil”.

meta.title: Assuming that the populations of bacteria are under bottom-up control, identify the mesocosms in which the bacterial populations will be highest.
